Where Finance Connects
+
Your complete procurement and spend management platform
+ Get 100% control and visibility on operational spend
+
Save time and money on every transaction
Book a demo
Tour the Spendesk app
Corporate cards
Set card limits and create approval flows with smart card controls
Accounts payable
Automate invoice handling from entry to payment
Procure-to-pay
Control and automate spend from intake to payment
Integrated budgeting
Plan departmental spending using our detailed budget features
Virtual cards
Generate unique virtual cards for secure one-off or recurring online payments
Expense claims
Manage and reimburse expenses without chasing for receipts
API & integrations
Link all of your existing accounting and business tools
Loved by 5,000+ Finance Teams
4.7/5
Spend management your business will love. Yes, really.
Ways to use Spendesk
Tired of chasing receipts? Ready to make employees and budget owners accountable? From business travel and subscription management to petty cash and beyond, tracking expenses has never been simpler.
Save time and reduce costs across your company
Set rules and policies that are smoothly adopted. Automate every step of the spend process. Uncover errors and see where you are overspending in real time. Businesses save up to 90% on their invoice processing costs.
Why finance teams choose Spendesk
Spendesk removes the biggest obstacles that make the work of finance teams tedious and frustrating. No more chasing employees for receipts, implementing processes that no one follows, or dealing with lost contracts and missed renewals.
See our solutions
The spend management platform that
connects the moving parts of your business
Real-time control on spend, secure payment methods, clever automations, and more — making accounting a breeze.
Define your budgets
Pay & set spend rules
Manage procurement
Monitor & collect
Automate & report
Integrate
All features
View our integrations
Community backed

Service focused
Our consultative approach sets us apart – 98% say getting started with us was easy.
Secure & compliant
We're serious about security. Your spending is safe and private.

Complete spend control.
Endless flexibility.
Modular, adaptable and built to evolve with you.
Tailored plans to fit your specific needs
Gain complete visibility and control over your company's finances with our intuitive platform and flexible pricing that scales alongside your business. Contact us to request a quote.
Included
Included
Foundations
Unlimited cards, users and control settings – our base package contains everything you need to manage spend, automate workflows and scale with ease.
INCLUDES:
Issue unlimited physical cards to empower teams and stay in control
Use single-use cards for secure, one-off payments
Manage subscriptions with recurring virtual cards

Find out more
Add-ons
Customise your solution with add-ons that match your needs.
Procure to pay
Popular
Procurement
Popular
Centralise, streamline and optimise your procurement to reduce cost and admin overhead.
Accounts Payable
Streamline your invoice management: pay suppliers globally, securely, on time and in the right currency.
“We were looking to implement a tool that would be easily adopted by all stakeholders beyond Finance and Purchasing.”
Aurore Teboul
Procurement Manager, PayFit
Business
Advanced workflows & policies
Add dynamic approver roles and multi-condition workflows to simplify even the most complex approval processes with seamless, automated consistency.
Powerful multi-entity management
Manage multiple legal entities with centralised visibility, tailored control and flexible configurations, all in one place.
HR & ERP Integrations
Easily connect Spendesk to your business-critical tools, including 40+ HRIS tools, ERP and travel systems, or choose our native API to automate everything in between.
AI-based automation and fraud detection
Finance-focused AI that uncovers insights, streamlines bookkeeping and safeguards against errors.
Your plan
See details
Included
Foundations
CFO Connect Pro
2
Included
Request a free quote
Our customers get results
4x
faster month end
98%
of receipts collected automatically
100%
visibility and control
Loved by 5,000+ Finance Teams
4.7/5
Want to know more?
It can be hard to choose new tools for your business. We’re here to help you make the right decision.
Get more answers
How are prices calculated?
Our packages are made up of two components:
1. Fixed fee for platform access
To simplify and streamline recurring costs, we have a fixed monthly subscription fee to get access to all payment methods and the platform plan of your choice. You also get unlimited users.
2. Variable fees for transaction usage
To ensure you only pay for what you use, we have variable pricing based on the number of transactions your team makes on Spendesk. Transactions include card purchases, invoice payments and expense claims.
Want to know more about pricing?
Contact our sales.
How much does a physical card cost?
Card orders are free of charge and there are no monthly card fees. You can order as many cards as you need for your employees.
What's the price of an active user?
We do not charge active user fees. With our paid plans, add as many spenders as you want for ongoing or even just one-off spending.
Start with the essentials. Scale as you grow.
Spendesk gives you flexibility, control, and the tools to make smarter spend decisions — at every stage.
Build your plan

analysis.name: Spendesk
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one procurement and spend management platform giving finance teams complete visibility and control over company spending with corporate cards, accounts payable, and automated expense management.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance teams (CFOs, finance managers) at European SMB and mid-market companies needing to centralize and automate spend, cards, invoices, and procurement across departments or legal entities.

features.name: physical corporate cards
features.description: Issue unlimited physical cards to employees with configurable spending limits and controls
features.evidence_quote: Issue unlimited physical cards to empower teams and stay in control

features.name: virtual cards (single-use)
features.description: Generate unique single-use virtual cards for secure one-off online payments
features.evidence_quote: Use single-use cards for secure, one-off payments

features.name: virtual cards (recurring)
features.description: Recurring virtual cards for ongoing subscription payments
features.evidence_quote: Manage subscriptions with recurring virtual cards

features.name: multi-use virtual cards
features.description: Project or event scoped virtual cards for tracking spend against a specific purpose
features.evidence_quote: Track project or event spend with multi-use cards

features.name: expense claims
features.description: Employee expense submission, tracking, and reimbursement in one place
features.evidence_quote: Manage and reimburse expenses without chasing for receipts

features.name: mileage tracking
features.description: Submit and manage mileage-based expense claims
features.evidence_quote: Expense Claims / Mileage / Per Diem — Submit and manage your claims.

features.name: per diem management
features.description: Per diem expense submissions and management
features.evidence_quote: Expense Claims / Mileage / Per Diem — Submit and manage your claims.

features.name: receipt ocr
features.description: Automatic extraction of receipt data using OCR to save manual entry time
features.evidence_quote: Extract receipt data automatically with OCR and save valuable time

features.name: receipt matching
features.description: Automatic matching of receipts to the corresponding spend transaction
features.evidence_quote: Match receipts instantly to the right spend

features.name: automated receipt reminders
features.description: Custom rules and automated reminders to ensure timely receipt collection
features.evidence_quote: Create custom rules to ensure receipt collection and set up automated reminders

features.name: accounts payable
features.description: End-to-end invoice management from entry to payment, including global supplier payments
features.evidence_quote: Automate invoice handling from entry to payment

features.name: supplier invoice management
features.description: Submit, manage, pay, and bookkeep supplier invoices
features.evidence_quote: Supplier Invoices — Manage, pay and bookkeep your invoices with our Submit my Invoice feature.

features.name: e-invoicing compliance
features.description: European e-invoicing compliance tooling across multiple countries
features.evidence_quote: E-invoicing — Everything you need to know to comply with e-invoicing requirements across Europe

features.name: procure-to-pay
features.description: Full procurement cycle from purchase request intake through approval to payment
features.evidence_quote: Control and automate spend from intake to payment

features.name: purchase requests
features.description: Structured intake flow for employees to submit spend requests before purchasing
features.evidence_quote: Manage team purchase requests directly from your Slack account.

features.name: approval workflows
features.description: Configurable approval flows for card spend, invoices, and purchase requests

differentiators: No per-user fees — unlimited users on all paid plans
No monthly card fees — unlimited physical cards included
Modular add-on pricing allows companies to pay only for capabilities they use
Procure-to-pay coverage in a single platform (intake → approval → payment → bookkeeping)
CFO Connect community of 12,000+ finance leaders included free for customers
98% of customers say onboarding was easy
Businesses save up to 90% on invoice processing costs
99% receipts collected on time with automated reminders
ISO 27001:2022 certified with end-to-end encryption, PCI-DSS, and PSD2 compliance

recent_ships.what: Apple Pay and Google Pay support added for iOS and Android
recent_ships.source: Landing page: 'Your smartphone is now your Spendesk card — Apple Pay and Google Pay offer easy, secure, and private ways to pay — now available on both iOS and Android devices.'

recent_ships.what: Migration to Adyen as new banking provider
recent_ships.source: Docs: 'Your transition to our new banking provider Adyen — Get to know how to transition to Adyen.'

praised: Time savings: 'We save so much time by not chasing receipts each month.' — CCGroup
Security and reliability: 'Our spending is more reliable and secure.' — Big Mamma
Ease of onboarding: 98% say getting started was easy (Spendesk-reported)
Receipt automation: 99% receipts collected on time (Spendesk-reported)

tiers.name: Foundations
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited cards/users, expense claims, OCR, SSO, Slack, Xero/QBO/DATEV, real-time budgets, multi-entity reporting

tiers.name: Foundations + Procure to Pay add-on
tiers.headline_inclusions: Foundations + procurement workflow and accounts payable with global supplier payments

tiers.name: Foundations + Business add-on
tiers.headline_inclusions: Foundations + advanced multi-condition approvals, multi-entity, 40+ HRIS/ERP integrations, AI automation & fraud detection

pricing.notes: Pricing has two components: (1) fixed monthly platform fee and (2) variable per-transaction fee covering card purchases, invoice payments, and expense claims. No per-user fees and no card fees. CFO Connect Pro (625€/yr standalone) is free for Spendesk customers (one seat per customer). All prices require a sales quote — no self-serve checkout visible. QuickBooks integration is US-only.
